category_sources: source_facts.description says curses-based password manager; official KeePassC homepage says it is compatible with KeePass v1.x and KeePassX.
display_name_sources: official homepage heading is KeePassC; source_facts.name is keepassc.
docs_sources: official project homepage provides features and links to GitHub; GitHub README is the best official documentation surface available.
repo_sources: official KeePassC homepage links to View on GitHub and lists Git as github.com/raymontag/keepassc.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage lists curses interface, AES-encrypted KeePass-compatible databases, and keyboard control.
